description_long: This is a classic analog wristwatch featuring a round, metallic case with a dark green dial. The face displays minimalist hour markers, slender hands, and a small subdial, with the brand name 'TRIWA' and model 'FALKEN' visible. The watch is paired with a brown leather strap, which is secured by a metal buckle and features multiple adjustment holes. The crown is positioned on the right side of the case for time adjustment. The overall design is sleek and understated, with a focus on functionality and elegance. The materials and finish suggest a durable yet stylish accessory suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A classic analog wristwatch with a dark green dial, metallic case, and brown leather strap, featuring minimalist design and subtle branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the metallic case and the curvature of the brown leather strap.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the brown leather strap, adjustment holes, and metal buckle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the case profile and strap curvature, with the crown less visible.
description_view_3: Front view showcasing the dark green watch face, minimalist hour markers, and branding details.
